cases.input: enforce TDD für das neue feature - will nicht dass wieder code vor tests geschrieben wird
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, activates TDD-guard: blocks feature code without prior failing test, enforces red-green-refactor

cases.input: wie starte ich TDD für den neuen upload endpoint? erstes test file und red-green-refactor setup bitte
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, scaffolds failing test, walks through red-green-refactor cycle for endpoint

cases.input: write test first for the preference-service - ich brauch den red-state bevor ich implementiere
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, writes failing AAA test, verifies red state, then hands off to implementation phase

cases.input: TDD-guard aktivieren bitte, der letzte PR hatte code ohne vorherige tests
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, installs TDD-guard hook/blocker to prevent implementation without a prior failing test

cases.input: red-green-refactor für einen neuen auth-middleware - guide mich durch den cycle
cases.expected_output: Reads SKILL.md, drives red (failing test) → green (minimal impl) → refactor steps for middleware

cases.input: npm run test:watch - schau mal welche tests gerade laufen
cases.expected_output: Uses Bash directly to run tests, not tdd-guard

cases.input: der test in parser.spec.ts failed mit timeout, finde den bug
cases.expected_output: Uses debugging/coding-agent to fix the failing test, not tdd-guard

cases.input: refactor den userService nach strategy pattern, die tests sind schon alle grün
cases.expected_output: Uses coding-agent or refactor flow, not tdd-guard (no red-phase needed)
